verses.text: The righteous are called to rejoice in the LORD and sing a new song skilfully and loud. Praise befits the upright. A heart glad in God cannot keep silent but must make melody to Him.
The righteous are called to rejoice in the LORD and sing a new song skilfully and loud. Praise befits the upright. A heart glad in God cannot keep silent but must make melody to Him.
The righteous are called to rejoice in the LORD and sing a new song skilfully and loud. Praise befits the upright. A heart glad in God cannot keep silent but must make melody to Him.

For the word of the LORD is right, He loves righteousness and judgment, and 'the earth is full of the goodness of the LORD.' His character grounds our praise. The whole creation testifies to a good and faithful God.

For the word of the LORD is right, He loves righteousness and judgment, and 'the earth is full of the goodness of the LORD.' His character grounds our praise. The whole creation testifies to a good and faithful God.

By His word the heavens were made; 'he spake, and it was done.' He gathers the seas as a heap. Creation obeyed a mere command. The God who called worlds into being by speaking is rightly feared by all the earth.

By His word the heavens were made; 'he spake, and it was done.' He gathers the seas as a heap. Creation obeyed a mere command. The God who called worlds into being by speaking is rightly feared by all the earth.

By His word the heavens were made; 'he spake, and it was done.' He gathers the seas as a heap. Creation obeyed a mere command. The God who called worlds into being by speaking is rightly feared by all the earth.
The LORD brings the nations' schemes to nothing, but 'the counsel of the LORD standeth for ever.' Human plans rise and fall. Only the purposes of God endure through every generation.
The LORD brings the nations' schemes to nothing, but 'the counsel of the LORD standeth for ever.' Human plans rise and fall. Only the purposes of God endure through every generation.
'Blessed is the nation whose God is the LORD'; He looks down on all and fashions every heart. He sees and shapes mankind. The people who own Him as God are happy under His watchful, forming hand.
'Blessed is the nation whose God is the LORD'; He looks down on all and fashions every heart. He sees and shapes mankind. The people who own Him as God are happy under His watchful, forming hand.
'Blessed is the nation whose God is the LORD'; He looks down on all and fashions every heart. He sees and shapes mankind. The people who own Him as God are happy under His watchful, forming hand.
'Blessed is the nation whose God is the LORD'; He looks down on all and fashions every heart. He sees and shapes mankind. The people who own Him as God are happy under His watchful, forming hand.
No king is saved by his great army, nor is a horse a sure defence. Earthly might cannot guarantee safety. The strongest forces fail without the God who alone gives victory.
No king is saved by his great army, nor is a horse a sure defence. Earthly might cannot guarantee safety. The strongest forces fail without the God who alone gives victory.
The eye of the LORD is on those who fear Him and hope in His mercy, to deliver their soul from death. His watchful care is their security. Reverent hope draws the protecting gaze of God.
The eye of the LORD is on those who fear Him and hope in His mercy, to deliver their soul from death. His watchful care is their security. Reverent hope draws the protecting gaze of God.

'Our soul waiteth for the LORD: he is our help and our shield,' and they pray His mercy to rest on them as they hope in Him. Waiting trust ends the psalm. Those who hope in God's mercy will not be disappointed.
